mnemonics: Make Others Intelligent Necessarily Think Clearly
My Neighbor Always Insists On Keeping Things
keyPoints: 8.1: In one-dimensional arrays, all elements are stored in contiguous memory locations.
8.2: In two-dimensional arrays, each element is stored at a unique memory location.
8.3: Initializing two-dimensional arrays requires specifying the number of rows and columns.
8.4: Array initialization can be done using the 'new' keyword in C++.
8.5: Arrays are a fundamental data structure in programming and have numerous applications.
